categories.name: Things you see in a wildfire

fun_fact: Right now, southern Spain is fighting one of its deadliest wildfires in years — over 3,200 hectares of Almería scorched, hundreds evacuated, and at least 12 lives lost. Weeks of extreme heat and drought turned the land into a tinderbox, exactly the conditions in today's puzzle. As the planet warms, these “wild” fires are growing longer, hotter and harder to fight. Follow the latest here.
